headline: Broadcom (AVGO): AI XPV Platform Sharpens Its Role in Custom Compute and Networking Infrastructure
summary: Broadcom Inc. (NASDAQ:AVGO) is one of the best AI networking stocks to buy according to analysts. The company gave investors a fresh AI infrastructure catalyst on June 9, when it announced the AI XPV Platform with Apollo and Blackstone as initial anchor investors. The platform is designed to enable more than 20 gigawatts of compute […]

headline: 3 Beaten Down AI Infrastructure Stocks to Buy in June
summary: AI infrastructure stocks have given investors a textbook entry window this month. The trio that anchors the spending cycle has all pulled back from spring highs, even as the underlying revenue trajectory keeps accelerating. NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA), Broadcom (NASDAQ:AVGO) and Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT) are the picks-and-shovels triangle of the AI buildout: silicon, custom accelerators and networking, and the ... 3 Beaten Down AI Infrastructure Stocks to Buy in June

headline: Meta At 17x P/E: Investing Doesn't Get Any Easier
summary: Meta Platforms remains under pressure due to investor skepticism over rising AI-driven capex and potential equity dilution. Learn why META stock is a buy.
